task: I need a quick way to reply to a client who sent a vague note and wants a revised concept by end of day. Can you give me a couple of reply options — one very short and one a little more polished — so I can pick the cleanest one?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here are two clean options:

**Very short:**  
Got it — I’m on it and will send a revised concept by end of day.

**A little more polished:**  
Understood — I’ll revise the concept and get it to you by end of day.

If you want, I can give you 3 more that sound a little firmer or more client-safe.
